template.name: Hero Section
template.bodyText: Project management software that enables your teams to collaborate, plan, analyze and manage everyday tasks

fields.name: headingText
fields.label: Heading Text
fields.description: Main heading displayed in the hero (64px bold, white)

fields.name: bodyText
fields.label: Body Description
fields.description: Supporting description text below the heading (18px, white)

fields.name: ctaLabel
fields.label: CTA Button Label
fields.description: Text label for the call-to-action button

fields.name: ctaUrl
fields.label: CTA Button URL
fields.description: Link destination for the CTA button

fields.name: imageSrc
fields.label: Hero Image
fields.description: Image displayed on the right side of the hero (824 x 549 px recommended)
